name: FadeJunkie
description: Free study tool for Texas barber students preparing for the TDLR state board exam — flashcards, timed practice quizzes, and live group study, built by barbers.
audience: Barber students in TDLR-licensed Texas barber programs, preparing for the Class A Barber written and practical exams
foundingContext: First digital product from the FadeJunkie barber-culture brand
primaryFeatures: 300+ flashcards across 13 Texas state board exam topics
Timed practice quiz (20/50/100 questions), randomized or by topic
Practical exam guide covering every TDLR practical exam section
